name: O-Negative
description: O-Negative is a Maliwan Seraph grenade mod. It is a high-damage Transfusion grenade that drains health from enemies and returns it as healing. The healing trails can be inconsistent, so it is best used as a supplement rather than your only sustain. Throwing it just before a risky fight can soften targets, then deliver healing shortly after.
notes:
Its minimum fuse time can roll as low as 0.1 seconds.

The name references the O-negative blood type, known as a universal donor.

special.description: After the first blast, it releases 8 homing child grenades. On hit, each child spawns a healing orb that can restore health to an ally.
special.title: Universal donor!

abilities: Spawns a number of child grenades that seek enemies and steal health upon impact.
